chapter: Chapter: 4. मेरा छोटा-सा निजी पुस्तकालय - धर्मवीर भारती

questions.question: Lekhak ne apne bachpan ki kaun si ghatna se paath ka aarambh kiya hai?
questions.answer: Lekhak ne 1989 ki apni bimaari aur dil ke daure (heart attack) ki ghatna se paath ka aarambh kiya hai.

questions.question: Doctoron ne lekhak ko lekar kya chetavni di thi?
questions.answer: Doctoron ne kaha tha ki lekhak ka bachna mushkil hai aur agar bache bhi to ve 'chalte-phirte lash' ban jayenge.

questions.question: Lekhak ke pita ki arthik sthiti kaisi thi?
questions.answer: Lekhak ke pita ki arthik sthiti bahut acchi nahi thi, ve ek niji naukri karte the.

questions.question: Lekhak ke ghar mein kaun-kaun si patrikaen aati thin?
questions.answer: Lekhak ke ghar mein 'Aryamitra', 'Saraswati', 'Grahini' aur bachon ki patrika 'Baalsakha' aati thin.

questions.question: Lekhak ko bachpan mein kaun si do kitaben bahut priya thin?
questions.answer: Lekhak ko 'Devasur Sangram' aur 'Satyarth Prakash' ke vivaran wali kitaben pasand thin.

questions.question: Lekhak ke pita ne unke liye ghar mein kya banwaya tha?
questions.answer: Lekhak ke pita ne unke liye ek choti si alag 'Library' yaani pustakalaya banwa diya tha.

questions.question: Lekhak ki maa unke kitabein padhne se kyon chintit rehti thin?
questions.answer: Maa ko darr tha ki lekhak din-bhar kahani ki kitaben padhte rahenge to school ki padhai mein piche reh jayenge.

questions.question: Pita ne lekhak ko school mein dakhila kyon nahi dilwaya tha?
questions.answer: Pita chahte the ki bachcha ghar par hi mool shiksha prapt kare, isliye unhe seedhe panchvi kaksha mein dakhila dilwaya gaya.

questions.question: Lekhak ne apni pehli kitab kaise kharidi thi?
questions.answer: Lekhak ne apni purani school ki kitaben bechkar mile paison se apni pehli kitab kharidi thi.

questions.question: Lekhak dwara kharidi gayi pehli kitab ka naam kya tha?
questions.answer: Lekhak dwara kharidi gayi pehli kitab ka naam 'Devdas' tha, jiske lekhak Sharat Chandra Chattopadhyay the.

questions.question: Kitab kharidne ke liye lekhak ko kitne paise mile the?
questions.answer: Lekhak ko purani kitaben bechne par do rupaye mile the, jismein se unhone das aane ki 'Devdas' kharidi.

questions.question: Lekhak ke liye 'Library' unka sabse surakshit sthan kyon tha?
questions.answer: Kyonki bimaari ke waqt jab unhe hila-dula bhi nahi jata tha, tab kitabon ke beech rehkar unhe sakoon milta tha.

questions.question: Lekhak ko 'Aryasamaji' hone ka kya fayda mila?
questions.answer: Ghar mein vichaaron ki azadi mili aur vibhinn prakar ki dharmik wa samajik kitaben padhne ka mauka mila.

questions.question: Lekhak ke library mein kitni kitaben thin?
questions.answer: Paath ke anusar, lekhak ke library mein hazaron kitaben thin, jo unhone saalon mein ikatthi ki thin.

questions.question: Lekhak ne 'Library' ko apna 'Niji' pustakalaya kyon kaha hai?
questions.answer: Kyonki har kitab unhone apni ruchi aur mehnat se kamaye ya bachaye paison se kharidi thi.

questions.question: Bimaari ke samay lekhak ne kitabon ke baare mein kya socha?
questions.answer: Unhone socha ki agar ve marr gaye, to in kitabon ka kya hoga, kaun inka khayal rakhega.

questions.question: Lekhak ko school se inaam mein kaun si do kitaben mili thin?
questions.answer: Unhe inaam mein do kitaben mili thin—ek pakshiyon ke baare mein aur dusri samundri jeevon ke baare mein.

questions.question: Lekhak ke pita ne 'Satyarth Prakash' ke liye kya shart rakhi thi?
questions.answer: Pita ne kaha tha ki tum iske chitra dekh sakte ho, lekin padhna tab jab bade ho jao.

questions.question: Lekhak ne apni library mein kitabon ko kaise sajaya tha?
questions.answer: Unhone kitabon ko vishayon ke anusar alag-alag racks mein tarteeb se sajaya tha.

questions.question: Lekhak ko cinema dekhne ke liye kitne paise milte the?
questions.answer: Lekhak ko cinema dekhne ke liye dedh rupaya milta tha.

questions.question: Lekhak ne cinema dekhne ke bajaye kya kiya?
questions.answer: Lekhak ne cinema dekhne ke bajaye un paison se 'Devdas' kitab kharid li.

questions.question: Dharmveer Bharti ji ki library mein kin bhashaon ki kitaben thin?
questions.answer: Unki library mein Hindi, Angrezi aur sanskrit bhashaon ki durlabh kitaben thin.

questions.question: Lekhak ne kitabon ko apna 'Sathi' kyon maana hai?
questions.answer: Kyonki kitabon ne unhe tanhai aur bimaari mein sahara diya aur unka gyan badhaya.

questions.question: Lekhak ki maa ne unhe kya aashirwad diya jab unhone pehli kitab dikhayi?
questions.answer: Maa ki aankhon mein aansu aa gaye aur unhone kaha ki kitabon ka dher lagao, par school ka dhyan rakhna.

questions.question: Is paath se humein kya seekh milti hai?
questions.answer: Is paath se seekh milti hai ki kitaben hamari sabse acchi dost hain aur swadhyaya (self-study) se hi gyan badhta hai.
